prompt: Hyper-realistic aerial view of thousands of wild animals migrating left to right. On the lush left, the herd is dense and vibrant. Moving horizontally, 73% of the animals disintegrate into grey ash, leaving a massive void of stark, cracked earth. By the right edge, the herd narrows to a tiny trickle. The barren grey space dominates the right, visually representing a 73% empty void to 27% surviving life. Cinematic lighting shifts from warm sun to cold shadows. No text, UI, or charts.
insight: Monitored vertebrate wildlife populations saw a 73% relative decline between 1970 and 2020.
